prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed wide-angle cityscape of Mumbai reimagined as a futuristic megacity at sunset, viewed from an elevated overlook above the coastline. The skyline is packed with dozens of towering futuristic skyscrapers of varied silhouettes, including 6 especially prominent supertall towers with sleek glass facades, sharp angular forms, and neon accents, mixed with dense mid-rise urban buildings below. On the right side, a long sea bridge resembling the Bandra-Worli Sea Link curves dramatically from the foreground into the distance over calm coastal water, with flowing streams of headlights and taillights. The sun sits low near the horizon over the Arabian Sea, casting glowing golden reflections across the water and bathing the scene in intense orange, amber, pink, and magenta light under richly layered clouds. In the lower left foreground, include a grand historic domed building inspired by South Mumbai heritage architecture, warmly illuminated, juxtaposed against the futuristic skyline; above it, add a hovering circular UFO-like platform with blue light. Also place 2 visible illuminated billboards in the lower-left and center-right urban area: one large sign reading "MUMBAI", "मुंबई", and "THE CITY OF DREAMS", and one smaller sign reading "NAVI MUMBAI". Add 1 small flying vehicle or drone near the central towers. Place large clean white uppercase text near the top center reading CHATGPT. The overall mood is epic, aspirational, glossy, highly detailed, vibrant, cinematic sci-fi urban fantasy, with atmospheric haze, glowing windows, reflective glass, dramatic contrast, and a polished concept-art finish.
